Justice will prevail in the end.
Please submit your application by Friday.
We can substitute honey for sugar.
The contract will terminate next month.
Drivers who violate rules will be penalized.
They had to abandon the project.
We have adequate time to finish.
The park is adjacent to the school.
Her joy was apparent on her face.
She is capable of handling this.
I have concerns concerning your plan.
Are you eligible for this scholarship?
Is there an equivalent word in English?
I estimate it will take two hours.
It is evident that he is right.
Excess sugar is bad for health.
The excitement is hard to describe.
We need to execute the plan.
The expansion of the city continues.
Do not expose your skin to the sun.
Too much exposure to screens is bad.
Hard work is a key factor.
Failure is the mother of success.
Can you give me a figure?
Save the file on your computer.
I watched a great film last night.
There is a fire in the kitchen.
She works for a law firm.
These shoes do not fit me.
There was a flash of lightning.
We need flour to make bread.
The flow of water is strong.
I am hungry, I need food.
You cannot force me to do this.
I want to learn a foreign language.
Many animals live in the forest.
Do not forget to call me.
Use a fork to eat salad.
Change the format of the file.
This is the foundation of our success.
Put the picture in a frame.
The people here are very friendly.
The frog jumped into the pond.
Stand in front of the class.
What is the function of this?
Go further and you will see it.
We can gain knowledge from books.
The art gallery is free today.
There is a big gap between them.
Park the car in the garage.
She grows vegetables in her garden.
Natural gas is a clean energy.
In general, I agree with you.
He is generous with his time.
He made a gesture of apology.
This is a giant step forward.
Global warming is a serious issue.
My goal is to learn English.
I am in the tenth grade.
Grain is the main food in many countries.
Draw a graph to show the data.
I am grateful for your help.
I go to the gym every day.
Give me half of the cake.

words.w: The cat is on the table.
We go to school every day.
My father works in a bank.
The sun rises in the east.
She can speak English very well.
I usually get up at seven.
There is a park near my home.
words.ph: /ðer ɪz ə pɑːrk nɪr maɪ hoʊm/

words.w: I want to drink some water.
My mother is cooking dinner in the kitchen.
words.cn: 我妈妈正在厨房做晚饭。
words.ph: /maɪ ˈmʌðər ɪz ˈkʊkɪŋ ˈdɪnər ɪn ðə ˈkɪtʃɪn/

words.w: There are many birds in the tree.
words.ph: /ðer ɑːr ˈmeni bɜːrdz ɪn ðə triː/

words.w: I go to school by bus every morning.
words.cn: 我每天早上坐公共汽车上学。
words.ph: /aɪ ɡoʊ tu skuːl baɪ bʌs ˈevri ˈmɔːrnɪŋ/

words.w: She is reading a storybook now.
words.cn: 她现在正在读一本故事书。

words.w: The dog is running after the cat.
words.ph: /ðə dɔːɡ ɪz ˈrʌnɪŋ ˈæftər ðə kæt/

words.w: We have four classes in the morning.
words.ph: /wi hæv fɔːr ˈklæsɪz ɪn ðə ˈmɔːrnɪŋ/

words.w: The weather is very hot in summer.
words.ph: /ðə ˈweðər ɪz ˈveri hɑːt ɪn ˈsʌmər/

words.w: I often help my mother do housework.
words.ph: /aɪ ˈɔːfn help maɪ ˈmʌðər duː ˈhaʊswɜːrk/

words.w: Please give me a cup of tea.
words.ph: /pliːz ɡɪv miː ə kʌp ʌv tiː/

words.w: There is a big supermarket near our school.
words.cn: 我们学校附近有一家大超市。
words.ph: /ðer ɪz ə bɪɡ ˈsuːpərmɑːrkit nɪr aʊər skuːl/

words.w: I am good at drawing and singing.
words.ph: /aɪ æm ɡʊd æt ˈdrɔːɪŋ ænd ˈsɪŋɪŋ/

words.w: I have been studying English for three years.
words.ph: /aɪ hæv bɪn ˈstʌdiɪŋ ˈɪŋɡlɪʃ fɔːr θriː jɪrz/

words.w: The book that I bought yesterday is very interesting.
words.cn: 我昨天买的那本书非常有趣。
words.ph: /ðə bʊk ðæt aɪ bɔːt ˈjestərdeɪ ɪz ˈveri ˈɪntrəstɪŋ/

words.w: She has decided to move to another city next month.
words.cn: 她决定下个月搬到另一个城市。
words.ph: /ʃi hæz dɪˈsaɪdɪd tu muːv tu əˈnʌðər ˈsɪti nekst mʌnθ/

words.w: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
words.cn: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家里。
words.ph: /ɪf ɪt reɪnz təˈmɑːroʊ, wi wɪl steɪ æt hoʊm/

words.w: The teacher asked us to finish the homework before Friday.
words.cn: 老师要求我们在周五之前完成作业。
words.ph: /ðə ˈtiːtʃər æskt ʌs tu ˈfɪnɪʃ ðə ˈhoʊmwɜːrk bɪˈfɔːr ˈfraɪdeɪ/

words.w: I prefer reading books to watching TV in my free time.
words.cn: 在空闲时间，我更喜欢看书而不是看电视。
words.ph: /aɪ prɪˈfɜːr ˈriːdɪŋ bʊks tu ˈwɑːtʃɪŋ tiːviː ɪn maɪ friː taɪm/

words.w: The museum is open from 9 AM to 5 PM every day.
words.cn: 博物馆每天上午9点到下午5点开放。
words.ph: /ðə mjuːˈziːəm ɪz ˈoʊpən frʌm naɪn eɪ em tu faɪv piː em ˈevri deɪ/

words.w: Although he is young, he is very responsible.
words.cn: 虽然他年纪很小，但他非常负责任。
words.ph: /ɔːlˈðoʊ hi ɪz jʌŋ, hi ɪz ˈveri rɪˈspɑːnsəbl/

words.w: We should protect the environment for future generations.
words.cn: 我们应该为后代保护环境。
words.ph: /wi ʃʊd prəˈtekt ðə ɪnˈvaɪrənmənt fɔːr ˈfjuːtʃər ˌdʒenəˈreɪʃnz/

words.w: The movie was so interesting that I watched it twice.
words.cn: 这部电影太有趣了，所以我看了两遍。
words.ph: /ðə ˈmuːvi wʌz soʊ ˈɪntrəstɪŋ ðæt aɪ wɑːtʃt ɪt twaɪs/

words.w: She not only speaks English but also French.
words.cn: 她不仅会说英语，还会说法语。
words.ph: /ʃi nɑːt ˈoʊnli spiːks ˈɪŋɡlɪʃ bʌt ˈɔːlsoʊ frentʃ/

words.w: By the time I arrived, the meeting had already started.
words.cn: 我到达的时候，会议已经开始了。
words.ph: /baɪ ðə taɪm aɪ əˈraɪvd, ðə ˈmiːtɪŋ hæd ɔːlˈredi ˈstɑːrtɪd/

words.w: The faster you run, the more tired you will feel.
words.ph: /ðə ˈfæstər juː rʌn, ðə mɔːr ˈtaɪərd juː wɪl fiːl/

words.w: I wonder what would happen if nobody showed up.
words.cn: 我想知道如果没有人出现会发生什么。
words.ph: /aɪ ˈwʌndər wʌt wʊd ˈhæpən ɪf ˈnoʊbɑːdi ʃoʊd ʌp/

words.w: It is important to keep a healthy lifestyle.
words.cn: 保持健康的生活方式很重要。
words.ph: /ɪt ɪz ɪmˈpɔːrtənt tu kiːp ə ˈhelθi ˈlaɪfstaɪl/

words.w: Could you tell me how to get to the nearest hospital?
words.cn: 你能告诉我怎么去最近的医院吗？
words.ph: /kʊd juː tel miː haʊ tu ɡet tu ðə ˈnɪrɪst ˈhɑːspɪtl/

words.w: I am looking forward to hearing from you soon.
words.cn: 我期待很快收到你的回信。
words.ph: /aɪ æm ˈlʊkɪŋ ˈfɔːrwərd tu ˈhɪrɪŋ frʌm juː suːn/

words.w: It has been raining since yesterday afternoon.
words.cn: 从昨天下午开始就一直下雨。
words.ph: /ɪt hæz bɪn ˈreɪnɪŋ sɪns ˈjestərdeɪ ˌæftərˈnuːn/

words.w: He used to play basketball when he was young.
words.ph: /hi juːst tu pleɪ ˈbæskɪtbɔːl wen hi wʌz jʌŋ/

words.w: I think that learning a foreign language is very useful.
words.cn: 我认为学习一门外语非常有用。
words.ph: /aɪ θɪŋk ðæt ˈlɜːrnɪŋ ə ˈfɔːrən ˈlæŋɡwɪdʒ ɪz ˈveri ˈjuːsfl/

words.w: The harder you work, the luckier you will be.
words.ph: /ðə ˈhɑːrdər juː wɜːrk, ðə ˈlʌkiər juː wɪl biː/

words.w: She told me that she had finished reading the novel.
words.cn: 她告诉我她已经读完那本小说了。
words.ph: /ʃi toʊld miː ðæt ʃi hæd ˈfɪnɪʃt ˈriːdɪŋ ðə ˈnɑːvəl/

words.w: If I were you, I would not give up so easily.
words.cn: 如果我是你，我不会这么轻易放弃。
words.ph: /ɪf aɪ wɜːr juː, aɪ wʊd nɑːt ɡɪv ʌp soʊ ˈiːzɪli/

words.w: The concert was so wonderful that everyone stood up and cheered.
words.cn: 音乐会太精彩了，每个人都站起来欢呼。
words.ph: /ðə ˈkɑːnsərt wʌz soʊ ˈwʌndərfl ðæt ˈevriwʌn stʊd ʌp ænd tʃɪrd/

words.w: He asked me whether I had been to Beijing before.
words.cn: 他问我以前有没有去过北京。
words.ph: /hi æskt miː ˈweðər aɪ hæd bɪn tu ˈbeɪʒɪŋ bɪˈfɔːr/

words.w: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset in my life.
words.cn: 我这辈子从未见过如此美丽的日落。
words.ph: /aɪ hæv ˈnevər siːn sʌtʃ ə ˈbjuːtɪfl ˈsʌnset ɪn maɪ laɪf/

words.w: We will go camping unless it rains this weekend.
words.cn: 除非这个周末下雨，否则我们就去露营。
words.ph: /wi wɪl ɡoʊ ˈkæmpɪŋ ənˈles ɪt reɪnz ðɪs ˈwiːkend/

words.w: The teacher encouraged us to practice speaking English every day.
words.cn: 老师鼓励我们每天练习说英语。
words.ph: /ðə ˈtiːtʃər ɪnˈkɜːrɪdʒd ʌs tu ˈpræktɪs ˈspiːkɪŋ ˈɪŋɡlɪʃ ˈevri deɪ/

words.w: This is the most interesting movie I have ever watched.
words.cn: 这是我看过的最有趣的电影。
words.ph: /ðɪs ɪz ðə moʊst ˈɪntrəstɪŋ ˈmuːvi aɪ hæv ˈevər wɑːtʃt/

words.w: It is believed that regular exercise can significantly reduce the risk of heart disease.
words.cn: 人们认为规律运动可以显著降低心脏病的风险。
words.ph: /ɪt ɪz bɪˈliːvd ðæt ˈreɡjələr ˈeksərsaɪz kæn sɪɡˈnɪfɪkəntli rɪˈduːs ðə rɪsk əv hɑːrt dɪˈziːz/

words.w: The research team has been investigating the effects of climate change on biodiversity.
words.cn: 研究团队一直在调查气候变化对生物多样性的影响。
words.ph: /ðə ˈriːsɜːrtʃ tiːm hæz bɪn ɪnˈvestɪɡeɪtɪŋ ðə ɪˈfekts ɒv ˈklaɪmət tʃeɪndʒ ɑn ˌbaɪəʊdaɪˈvɜːrsəti/

words.w: Not only did she win the competition, but she also broke the previous record.
words.cn: 她不仅赢得了比赛，还打破了之前的纪录。
words.ph: /nɑːt ˈoʊnli dɪd ʃi wɪn ðə ˌkɑːmpəˈtɪʃən, bʌt ʃi ˈɔːlsoʊ broʊk ðə ˈpriːviəs ˈrekɔːrd/

words.w: The philosophical implications of artificial intelligence have sparked intense debate among scholars.
words.cn: 人工智能的哲学含义引发了学者之间的激烈辩论。
words.ph: /ðə ˌfɪləˈsɑːfɪkəl ˌɪmplɪˈkeɪʃnz ɒv ˌɑːrtəˈfɪʃl ɪnˈtelɪdʒəns hæv spɑːrkt ɪnˈtens dɪˈbeɪt əˈmʌŋ ˈskɑːlərz/

words.w: Despite the numerous challenges, the project proceeded with remarkable success.
words.cn: 尽管面临诸多挑战，项目还是取得了显著的成功。
words.ph: /dɪˈspaɪt ðə ˈnuːmərəs ˈtʃælɪndʒɪz, ðə ˈprɑːdʒekt prəˈsiːdɪd wɪð rɪˈmɑːrkəbl səkˈses/

words.w: The economic policies implemented last year have yielded mixed results.
words.cn: 去年实施的经济政策产生了参差不齐的结果。
words.ph: /ðə ˌiːkəˈnɑːmɪk ˈpɑːləsiz ˈɪmplɪmentɪd læst jɪr hæv ˈjiːldɪd mɪkst rɪˈzʌlts/

words.w: Had it not been for their assistance, we would have failed to complete the mission.
words.cn: 要不是有他们的帮助，我们无法完成这项任务。
words.ph: /hæd ɪt nɑːt bɪn fɔːr ðer əˈsɪstəns, wi wʊd hæv feɪld tu kəmˈpliːt ðə ˈmɪʃən/

words.w: The correlation between diet and mental health has been the subject of extensive research.
words.cn: 饮食与心理健康之间的相关性一直是广泛研究的主题。
words.ph: /ðə ˌkɔːrəˈleɪʃən bɪˈtwiːn ˈdaɪət ænd ˈmentl helθ hæz bɪn ðə ˈsʌbdʒekt ɒv ɪkˈstensɪv ˈriːsɜːrtʃ/

words.w: While acknowledging the limitations of the study, the researchers emphasized its significance.
words.cn: 虽然承认研究的局限性，但研究人员强调了其重要性。
words.ph: /waɪl əkˈnɑːlɪdʒɪŋ ðə ˌlɪmɪˈteɪʃnz ɒv ðə ˈstʌdi, ðə ˈriːsɜːrtʃərz ɪmˈfəsaɪzd ɪts sɪɡˈnɪfɪkəns/

words.w: The novel explores complex themes such as identity, alienation, and existential dread.
words.cn: 这部小说探讨了诸如身份认同、疏离感和存在主义焦虑等复杂主题。
words.ph: /ðə ˈnɑːvəl ɪkˈsplɔːrz ˈkɑːmpleks θiːmz sʌtʃ æz aɪˈdentəti, ˌeɪliəˈneɪʃən, ænd ɪɡˌzɪstenʃl dred/

words.w: Rarely do we encounter such a perfect example of classical architecture.
words.cn: 我们很少能遇到如此完美的古典建筑典范。
words.ph: /ˈrerli duː wi ɪnˈkaʊntər sʌtʃ ə ˈpɜːrfɪkt ɪɡˈzæmpl ɒv ˈklæsɪkəl ˈɑːrkɪtektʃər/

words.w: The technological revolution has fundamentally transformed how we communicate and work.
words.cn: 技术革命从根本上改变了我们的沟通和工作方式。
words.ph: /ðə ˌteknəˈlɑːdʒɪkl ˌrevəˈluːʃən hæz fəndəˈmentəli trænsˈfɔːrmd haʊ wi kəˈmjuːnɪkeɪt ænd wɜːrk/

words.w: Were the government to implement these changes, public reaction would be unpredictable.
words.cn: 如果政府实施这些变革，公众的反应将难以预测。
words.ph: /wɜːr ðə ˈɡʌvərnmənt tu ˈɪmplɪment ðiːz tʃeɪndʒɪz, ˈpʌblɪk riˈækʃən wʊd bi ˌʌnprɪˈdɪktəbl/

words.w: The integration of sustainable practices into business models is becoming increasingly imperative.
words.cn: 将可持续实践融入商业模式正变得越来越重要。
words.ph: /ðə ˌɪntɪˈɡreɪʃən ɒv səˈsteɪnəbl ˈpræktɪsɪz ˈɪntuː ˈbɪznəs ˈmɑːdəlz ɪz bɪˈkʌmɪŋ ɪnˈkriːsɪŋli ɪmˈperətɪv/

words.w: Regardless of the outcome, the journey itself has been incredibly rewarding.
words.cn: 无论结果如何，这段旅程本身就已经非常有价值了。
words.ph: /rɪˈɡɑːrdləs ɒv ðə ˈaʊtkʌm, ðə ˈdʒɜːrni ɪtˈself hæz bɪn ɪnˈkredəbli rɪˈwɔːrdɪŋ/

words.w: The museum's collection includes artifacts dating back to ancient civilizations.
words.cn: 博物馆的收藏包括可以追溯到古代文明的文物。
words.ph: /ðə mjuːˈziːəmz kəˈlekʃən ɪnˈkluːdz ˈɑːrtɪfækts ˈdeɪtɪŋ bæk tu ˈeɪnʃənt ˌsɪvəlaɪˈzeɪʃnz/

words.w: It is widely acknowledged that education plays a crucial role in social mobility.
words.cn: 人们普遍认为教育在社会流动性中起着至关重要的作用。
words.ph: /ɪt ɪz ˈwaɪdli əkˈnɑːlɪdʒd ðæt ˌedʒuˈkeɪʃn pleɪz ə ˈkruːʃəl roʊl ɪn ˈsoʊʃl moʊˈbɪləti/

words.w: The exhibition featured works by artists from diverse cultural backgrounds.
words.cn: 展览展出了来自不同文化背景的艺术家作品。
words.ph: /ðə ˌeksəˈbɪʃn ˈfiːtʃərd wɜːrks baɪ ˈɑːrtɪsts frʌm daɪˈvɜːrs ˈkʌltʃərəl ˈbækɡraʊndz/

words.w: Seldom has a single event had such a profound impact on global markets.
words.cn: 很少有单一事件对全球市场产生如此深远的影响。
words.ph: /ˈseldəm hæz ə ˈsɪŋɡl ɪˈvent hæd sʌtʃ ə prəˈfaʊnd ˈɪmpækt ɑn ˈɡloʊbl ˈmɑːrkɪts/

words.w: The professor urged students to think critically rather than accept information at face value.
words.cn: 教授敦促学生批判性地思考，而不是只看表面地接受信息。
words.ph: /ðə prəˈfesər ɜːrdʒd ˈstuːdnts tu θɪŋk ˈkrɪtɪkli ˈræðər ðæn əkˈsept ˌɪnfərˈmeɪʃn æt feɪs ˈvæljuː/

words.w: Environmental degradation poses a threat that cannot be ignored by any nation.
words.cn: 环境恶化构成了任何国家都无法忽视的威胁。
words.ph: /ɪnˌvaɪrənˈmentl ˌdeɡrəˈdeɪʃən poʊzɪz ə θret ðæt kænˈnɑːt bi ɪɡˈnɔːrd baɪ ˈeni ˈneɪʃn/

words.w: Only when we fully understand the problem can we find an effective solution.
words.cn: 只有充分理解问题，我们才能找到有效的解决方案。
words.ph: /ˈoʊnli wen wi ˈfʊli ˌʌndərˈstænd ðə ˈprɑːbləm kæn wi faɪnd ən ɪˈfektɪv səˈluːʃən/

words.w: The discovery of penicillin is regarded as one of the greatest milestones in medical history.
words.cn: 青霉素的发现被认为是医学史上最伟大的里程碑之一。
words.ph: /ðə dɪˈskʌvəri əv ˌpenɪˈsɪlɪn ɪz rɪˈɡɑːrdɪd æz wʌn əv ðə ˈɡreɪtɪst ˈmaɪlstoʊnz ɪn ˈmedɪkl ˈhɪstəri/

words.w: It is essential that every citizen take responsibility for protecting the environment.
words.cn: 每个公民都有责任保护环境，这一点至关重要。
words.ph: /ɪt ɪz ɪˈsenʃl ðæt ˈevri ˈsɪtɪzn teɪk rɪˌspɑːnsəˈbɪləti fɔːr prəˈtektɪŋ ðə ɪnˈvaɪrənmənt/

words.w: The fact that she passed the exam with flying colors surprised everyone.
words.cn: 她以优异的成绩通过了考试，这让所有人都感到惊讶。
words.ph: /ðə fækt ðæt ʃi pæst ði ɪɡˈzæm wɪð ˈflaɪɪŋ ˈkʌlərz sərˈpraɪzd ˈevriwʌn/

words.w: What impressed me most was her determination to overcome every obstacle she encountered.
words.cn: 最让我印象深刻的是她克服所遇到的每一个障碍的决心。
words.ph: /wʌt ɪmˈprest miː moʊst wʌz hɜːr dɪˌtɜːrmɪˈneɪʃən tu ˌoʊvərˈkʌm ˈevri ˈɑːbstəkl ʃi ɪnˈkaʊntərd/

words.w: Having been exposed to different cultures, she developed a broader perspective on life.
words.cn: 由于接触了不同的文化，她对生活有了更广阔的视角。
words.ph: /ˈhævɪŋ bɪn ɪkˈspoʊzd tu ˈdɪfrənt ˈkʌltʃərz, ʃi dɪˈveləpt ə ˈbrɔːdər pərˈspektɪv ɑn laɪf/

words.w: Under no circumstances should we sacrifice long-term benefits for short-term gains.
words.cn: 在任何情况下，我们都不应以牺牲长远利益来换取短期收益。
words.ph: /ˈʌndər noʊ ˈsɜːrkəmstænsɪz ʃʊd wi ˈsækrɪfaɪs lɔːŋ-tɜːrm ˈbenɪfɪts fɔːr ʃɔːrt-tɜːrm ɡeɪnz/

words.w: The committee is considering whether to adopt the new policy proposed by the research department.
words.cn: 委员会正在考虑是否采纳研究部门提出的新政策。
words.ph: /ðə kəˈmɪti ɪz kənˈsɪdərɪŋ ˈweðər tu əˈdɑːpt ðə nuː ˈpɑːləsi prəˈpoʊzd baɪ ðə rɪˈsɜːrtʃ dɪˈpɑːrtmənt/

words.w: With technology advancing at an unprecedented rate, traditional industries are facing unprecedented challenges.
words.cn: 随着技术以前所未有的速度发展，传统行业正面临着前所未有的挑战。
words.ph: /wɪð tekˈnɑːlədʒi ədˈvænsɪŋ æt ən ʌnˈpresɪdentɪd reɪt, trəˈdɪʃənl ˈɪndəstriz ɑːr ˈfeɪsɪŋ ʌnˈpresɪdentɪd ˈtʃælɪndʒɪz/

words.w: The scientist devoted her entire life to researching cures for diseases that had plagued humanity for centuries.
words.cn: 这位科学家将毕生精力投入到研究困扰人类数百年的疾病疗法中。
words.ph: /ðə ˈsaɪəntɪst dɪˈvoʊtɪd hɜːr ɪnˈtaɪər laɪf tu rɪˈsɜːrtʃɪŋ kjʊərz fɔːr dɪˈziːzɪz ðæt hæd ˈpleɪɡd hjuːˈmænəti fɔːr ˈsentʃəriz/
